mapper.select: SELECT a.vrfcn_inst_id, vi.vrfcn_inst_nm, a.oprtr_id, o.oprtr_nm, a.rprt_yr, a.assgn_dt FROM com.tn_vrfcn_assgn a JOIN com.tn_vrfcn_inst vi ON vi.vrfcn_inst_id = a.vrfcn_inst_id AND NOW() BETWEEN vi.use_bgng_dt AND vi.use_end_dt JOIN com.tn_oprtr o ON o.oprtr_id = a.oprtr_id AND NOW() BETWEEN o.use_bgng_dt AND o.use_end_dt WHERE (#{rprtYr,jdbcType=VARCHAR} IS NULL OR a.rprt_yr = #{rprtYr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AND NOW() BETWEEN a.use_bgng_dt AND a.use_end_dt ORDER BY a.rprt_yr DESC, vi.vrfcn_inst_nm, o.oprtr_nm
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO com.tn_vrfcn_assgn (vrfcn_inst_id, oprtr_id, rprt_yr, assgn_dt, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id) VALUES (#{vrfcnInstId}, #{oprtrId}, #{rprtYr}, CURRENT_DATE, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{userId}, NOW(), #{userId})
